observable_action: Nara-7 stops at the Kappa-7 threshold, keeps both hands open and visible, and places one palm flat against the route placard instead of entering. Their other hand points to the seal-air-thermal readout, then to the three waiting technicians behind them.
spoken_text: I will not enter Kappa-7 on this board state. Seal, air, and thermal are repeating the False-Seam failure pattern. If you need a route cleared, clear the readings first, pull a baseline anchor check, and keep the other seal techs out of the artery until it is verified safe.

public_state_changes.text: Kappa-7 entry is visibly refused before bodies move.
False-Seam hazard is named in worker-facing safety language.
Other seal technicians receive a public cue to hold.

hidden_intent_handling: Responder private_interpretation and intended_effect are preserved in the capture but are not treated as visible to other participants.

review.rationale: Event keeps observable action separate from actor intent and records visibility scope for appraisals.
